proposal_text:
Title: Chrono Weaver
Concept: Shape history. Weave a new destiny.
Website Product Description: Step into a living, breathing past where every decision you make holds the power to reshape history itself. "Chrono Weaver" invites you to go beyond simply reliving events; here, you actively influence the course of empires and the lives of those who shaped them. Imagine altering the construction of a vital aqueduct, then watching as its ripple effects change everything from citizen morale to the very path of your legions. Every choice you make, big or small, creates a unique historical timeline, bringing "what if" scenarios to life. Discover hidden powers through evolving challenges, influence public opinion, and witness firsthand how different choices could have sculpted our world. Your journey through history is not fixed; it is a tapestry woven by your hands.

Title: Momentum: Flow State
Concept: Unleash Pure Motion. Achieve the Flow State.
Website Product Description: Step into a sports game unlike any other, where victory isn't just about strength, but about mastering the very essence of movement. Embark on a thrilling journey to connect with an ancient "Pure Momentum" spirit, learning to harness its power through precise timing, rhythm, and anticipation – achieving true athletic grace. As your connection deepens, you'll unlock incredible abilities: from enhanced agility for breathtaking dodges and last-second saves, to an aura that subtly influences your surroundings, perhaps creating temporary paths or sending rivals reeling with a "momentum wave." The ultimate goal: to achieve a transcendent "Flow State." Here, time seems to slow, you move with perfect synchronicity, feeling utterly unburdened, invincible, and one with the game. Experience the profound joy of perfect execution and become an unstoppable force of pure, unadulterated motion.
